name: Bruschetta Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chopped tomatoes in a mixing bowl.
2. Mix in the crushed garlic, salt, and chopped cilantro.
3. Cover and refrigerate. The salt will help draw excess liquid out of the tomatoes.
4. Drain the liquid from the tomato mixture using a slotted spoon.
5. Add the olive oil to the drained tomato mixture.
6. Refrigerate until serving time.
7. Using a slotted spoon, place 1½-2 tablespoons of the mixture onto each toasted bread triangle.
